entry.title: MNS CORP - TryHackMe
entry.summary: An Awes0me Beginner friendly CTF challenge created by my friend Manas Ramesh, Let’s exploit the machine. Room : https://tryhackme.com/room/mnsctf1initcrew Author : @jacksparrow1998 Reconnaissance: We can start with nmap scan. ➜ nmap -sC -sV 10.10.209.251 --min-rate 1000 Starting Nmap 7.92 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2024-03-02 21:41 IST Nmap scan report for 10....

entry.title: Explore - HackTheBox
entry.summary: In this blog we are going to discuss about pwning explore from hackthebox. It is the First Android machine from HackTheBox. About The Machine Name OS Difficulty Creator Explore Android Easy bertolis Blood User User JoshSH Root jkr ...

entry.title: DomeCTF 2021
entry.summary: We Secured 7th Position At DomeCTF as Part of c0c0n 2021 Conference, Conducted by Kerala Police Cyberdome And Beagle Security. Challenges Writeups Brazil - Quick Challenge: quick_703471b249918e8fc14f95ba119bb7af.zip We can see here 5 QR Codes after extracting the given file. Use any online QRreader to get your flag parts. Combine all parts and submit the flag. domectf{fSFTiyvC9AvkTH...

entry.title: Year Of the JellyFish - TryHackMe
entry.summary: Room: https://tryhackme.com/room/yearofthejellyfish This article is about the room Year Of The JellyFish capture the flag created by MuirlandOracle on TryHackMe. This box is part of an OSCP voucher giveaway. The prize is donated by @q8fawazo. Reconnaissance: You will get a specific IP_Address of this machine, let’s start with nmap scan. nmap -sC -sV $IP we can see 80, 443 are open, l...

entry.title: Gravithon CTF 2021
entry.summary: I secured 7th position in the 24 hour Gravithon CTF 2021 at the Indian Tech Fest. Challenges-Writeups Welcome Warm Welcome Flag is given there. gravithon{W3lc0me&Welcome_t0_Gr4v1th0n_2021} You Got it You can find Hashtag on their Linkedin page. gravithon{#feelthegravity} How About Some Exploring the Things You can find flag on general chat in that discord server. ...
